Juno_GameplayItemToTagMapping.D095B3FA4C165F12EECB24A19641961E: A maneuverable floating Brick, capable of supporting the weight of vehicle builds. Off by default, Hover Bricks must be turned on via channel control from a Driver's Seat or Switch
